category_sources: Official mGBA site and repository describe it as an open-source Game Boy Advance emulator with Game Boy/Game Boy Color support
docs_sources: Official GitHub README documents features and usage context
Official GitHub wiki is an official documentation surface
Official mGBA site links to downloads, FAQ, scripting API, and GitHub
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already present: https://github.com/mgba-emu/mgba; per instruction, not re-determined
tags_sources: Official mGBA README lists Game Boy Advance, Game Boy, and Game Boy Color emulation features
